patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/438

## Problem
No way to create/update an item from one JSON document: `pm create -` treats `-` as the title; `--stdin` is unknown. Structured agents must translate an item into 10-20 flags; strict-mode errors suggest a 19-flag retry.

## Proposed fix
`pm create --stdin-json` and `pm update <id> --stdin-json` accepting the same item shape `pm get --json` emits (round-trip: get | modify | update). Flags win over document keys when both given. Reject unknown keys with did-you-mean.

## Definition of done
Create+update accept full item documents on stdin incl. deps/comments/files facets; round-trip spec (get -> update) green; SDK/MCP parity noted (MCP already takes structured params); docs + contracts updated.
GH-438: accept a full item JSON document on stdin for pm create / pm update

Dogfood GH-438: no single-document create/update; agents translate items into 10-20 flags. Duplicate check: searched stdin json/document create — only per-field stdin support (--dep -, --note -) exists; no open overlap.
create/update accept --stdin-json full-item documents incl. facets; get->modify->update round-trip spec green; unknown keys rejected with did-you-mean; docs+contracts updated
